title: Bedrock New Dyes
description: A simple resource pack that add Minecraft Preview 1.21.110.20 dye texture to java edition
body:
Simple resource pack that add new dye from [Minecraft Preview 1.21.110.20](https://www.minecraft.net/ru-ru/article/minecraft-preview-1-21-110-20)

enjoy it :D
